jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Natco Pharma
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Radiologist looking for your next big career move? Natco Pharma in Thane offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Natco Pharma:
Natco Pharma is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in CPT Codes

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Natco Pharma!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
